summary: Stunning soundboard capture of the legendary Veneta ’72 show with an epic Dark Star and scorching China > Rider
review: The recording is a clean, well‑balanced soundboard source that lets listeners hear every nuance of what many consider one of the band’s peak performances. The set dazzles with a monster Dark Star, blistering China > Rider, soaring Bird Song and heartfelt Sing Me Back Home, all delivered with the band’s trademark drive and intuition. Reviewers are unanimous in calling it a historic, must‑hear show.

ai_rating.rationale: All six reviews award five stars and praise both the musical performance and the soundboard quality; no criticisms were noted, indicating an exceptional show captured with excellent audio.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the source as 'nice sounding', 'crisp' and a true soundboard capture with no reported glitches or muffiness.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set opens strong with The Promised Land and builds to a fiery China > Rider, closing with Bertha; the second set delivers an unforgettable Dark Star and other jams that flow seamlessly.
